title: Stage-2 lottery sleeve: post-event crypto momentum with own hard envelope (PCE 25-jun play)
source: session 2026-06-10 barbell plan (tournament two-stage structure: blind days 25-26 jun reward variance)
why: Prize structure is convex (1st 30k -> 26th-100th 0); in the blind stage 25-26 jun variance is nearly free above the top-25 floor. The conservative survival book cannot reach the podium; a deliberately-sized high-variance sleeve can. US PCE 25-jun 13:30 BST is the anchor event.
scope: breakout/momentum entry on BTC/ETH/SOL triggered post-event, direction from the print not a forecast
own risk envelope: fraction of equity, hard stop, trailing, pyramiding rule; latch independent of book DD-latch (reuse trend-tilt sleeve envelope pattern)
arming switch + size ladder decided by CEO at runtime
backtest harness over past macro-event windows for sanity, not optimization
recommendation: Build during week 1 (15-21 jun), rehearse on FOMC 17-jun / BoE 18-jun in demo, arm only for 25-26 jun.

history.reason: Implemented 3a8d0f9, risk-officer remediation 88ce179. Risk-officer BLOCK remediated; remaining must-fix items are OPERATIONAL: CEO arm-time acknowledgment + mandatory FOMC 17-jun rehearsal at risk_frac=0.005 incl latch-trip/clear/re-arm drill (runbook 6.1/6.2).

ARMING on the 17th still requires CEO approval at arm time per runsheet.
